channel.title: Bytes on Henri Kauhanen
channel.description: Recent content in Bytes on Henri Kauhanen

item.title: cre
item.description: An R package for fitting various models of the Constant Rate Effect, traditional (Kroch 1989) and non-traditional (Kauhanen & Walkden 2018), to linguistic data. See GitHub for installation and usage instructions. References Kauhanen, H. & Walkden, G. (2018) Deriving the Constant Rate Effect. Natural Language & Linguistic Theory, 36(2), 483–521. Kroch, A. (1989) Reflexes of grammar in patterns of language change. Language Variation and Change, 1, 199–244.

item.title: hipster
item.description: A.k.a. Henri’s Idiosyncratic Package of Somewhat Tedious Everyday Routines. Implements a handful of R functions I wish were part of the default installation. Status Very much in research and development. Installation With devtools: devtools::install_github("hkauhanen/hipster") Usage Documentation is less than comprehensive at the moment, but you may consult the manual – most of the routines are quite self-explanatory.

item.title: pbcm
item.description: An R package that implements the Parametric Bootstrap Cross-fitting Method (Wagenmakers et al. 2004). For installation instructions, function reference and a vignette, see the package website. References Wagenmakers, E.-J., Ratcliff, R., Gomez, P. & Iverson, G. J. (2004) Assessing model mimicry using the parametric bootstrap. Journal of Mathematical Psychology, 48(1), 28–50. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jmp.2003.11.004

item.title: ritwals
item.description: ritwals provides an R interface to the data provided by the World Atlas of Language Structures, along with some convenience functions for language sampling, subsetting, areal typology, and so forth. For installation and usage instructions, consult the package website.
